burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; limb ischemia and high CV risk

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Ankle-brachial index <0.90; Doppler ultrasound for confirmation

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low; underdiagnosis and late presentation are common

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ABI and Doppler mostly available in urban or tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Risk factor control, antiplatelets/statins, supervised exercise; revascularization when feasible
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Late presentation, limited vascular surgery access, and cost barriers
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Availability of low-cost generics for antiplatelets and statins
